title: Energizing Russian Cocoa Cake
description: Moist and decadent cake bursting with the rich flavors of cocoa, perfect for any occasion.
instructions: 2. Grease two 9-inch round cake pans and line the bottoms with parchment paper.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and cocoa.
4. In a large mixing bowl, whisk together eggs, butter, and energizing.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until well combined.
6. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared pans and smooth the tops.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for 5 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Once the cakes are completely cool, you can frost and decorate them as desired.
